serviceDetailPages.title: Residential Electrical Service
serviceDetailPages.heroImageAlt: Electrician working on residential electrical wiring
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Keep your home powered safely with repairs, upgrades, troubleshooting, and clean electrical installations.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Your home depends on safe electrical systems every day. Residential electrical service helps solve common household issues such as dead outlets, flickering lights, tripping breakers, outdated switches, unsafe wiring, and new installation needs. The goal is to make your home safer, more reliable, and ready for modern electrical demand.

featureCards.title: Restore Power
featureCards.description: Fix dead outlets, faulty switches, and rooms where power is unreliable or not working properly.

featureCards.title: Upgrade Fixtures
featureCards.description: Install new lighting, ceiling fixtures, dimmers, smart switches, and safer electrical devices.

featureCards.title: Solve Breaker Trips
featureCards.description: Identify overloaded circuits, faulty devices, or wiring issues that cause repeated breaker problems.

featureCards.title: Improve Safety
featureCards.description: Check electrical warning signs such as buzzing, warm outlets, flickering, sparks, or damaged wiring.

executionSequence.title: Home Electrical Review
executionSequence.description: We review the problem, affected rooms, devices, outlets, switches, panels, and customer concerns.

executionSequence.title: Safe Diagnosis
executionSequence.description: The issue is traced carefully to understand whether it is device-related, circuit-related, or wiring-related.

executionSequence.title: Repair or Install
executionSequence.description: Electrical work is completed cleanly with attention to safety, function, and long-term reliability.

serviceDetailPages.title: Commercial Electrical Service
serviceDetailPages.heroImageAlt: Commercial electrical panel and wiring in a business space
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Support your business with reliable electrical work for offices, storefronts, clinics, studios, and commercial spaces.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Commercial electrical service helps businesses stay safe, functional, and ready for daily operations. Whether the space needs lighting improvements, outlet placement, troubleshooting, maintenance, wiring changes, or electrical support for equipment, the work should reduce downtime and keep the business environment dependable.

featureCards.title: Keep Operations Running
featureCards.description: Resolve electrical issues that interfere with lighting, equipment, outlets, customer areas, or staff workspaces.

featureCards.title: Support Business Layouts
featureCards.description: Add or adjust electrical access for desks, displays, counters, treatment rooms, workstations, or equipment zones.

featureCards.title: Upgrade Lighting
featureCards.description: Improve interior, exterior, security, display, or task lighting for better visibility and customer experience.

featureCards.title: Reduce Electrical Risk
featureCards.description: Identify unsafe wiring, overloaded circuits, damaged devices, or electrical conditions that need attention.

executionSequence.title: Business Needs Review
executionSequence.description: We review the space, electrical issue, business hours, equipment needs, and any operational concerns.

executionSequence.title: Service Planning
executionSequence.description: The work is planned to support safety, function, and minimal disruption where possible.

executionSequence.title: Commercial Power Sync
executionSequence.description: Electrical work is completed with clean installation, testing, and practical communication.

serviceDetailPages.title: Panel Upgrades
serviceDetailPages.heroImageAlt: Modern electrical panel with organized breakers and wiring
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Eliminate flickering lights, limited capacity, and overloaded circuits with a safer modern electrical panel.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Your electrical panel is the motherboard of your home or business. Like an aging console running a modern arcade, outdated panels can't always handle today's power demand. Panel upgrades help support renovations, EV chargers, new appliances, basement units, additions, and safer everyday electrical use.

featureCards.title: Max Capacity
featureCards.description: Scale your power supply to handle EVs, home theatres, appliances, additions, and high-performance everyday electrical use.

featureCards.title: Circuit Armor
featureCards.description: Integrated whole-home protection helps support safer power flow and reduce electrical stress.

featureCards.title: Clear Feed
featureCards.description: Organized panel work helps eliminate confusing circuits and improves future maintenance.

featureCards.title: Zero Faults
featureCards.description: Replace hazardous old stock breakers, outdated equipment, and overloaded panels.

executionSequence.title: Diagnostic Scan
executionSequence.description: A full review of current electrical load, panel condition, and future power needs.

executionSequence.title: Core Installation
executionSequence.description: Professional panel replacement or upgrade with clean wiring and safe setup.

executionSequence.title: Final Sync
executionSequence.description: Testing and circuit balancing to confirm safe panel performance.

serviceDetailPages.title: Breaker and Circuit Troubleshooting
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Find the cause of tripping breakers, dead outlets, buzzing switches, and unreliable circuits.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Breaker and circuit problems are warning signs. A breaker may trip because of overloaded circuits, faulty appliances, damaged wiring, failing devices, loose connections, or unsafe electrical conditions. Troubleshooting helps identify the real source instead of repeatedly resetting the breaker and hoping the issue disappears.

featureCards.title: Find the Fault
featureCards.description: Trace the issue back to the circuit, device, wiring, breaker, or load problem.

featureCards.title: Stop Repeat Trips
featureCards.description: Identify why the breaker keeps shutting off and recommend the right fix.

featureCards.title: Protect Devices
featureCards.description: Reduce the risk of electrical damage to appliances, electronics, and connected equipment.

featureCards.title: Restore Confidence
featureCards.description: Make the affected circuit safer, clearer, and more dependable.

executionSequence.title: Symptom Scan
executionSequence.description: We review when the breaker trips, what is plugged in, and which rooms or devices are affected.

executionSequence.title: Circuit Investigation
executionSequence.description: The circuit is checked to locate overloads, faulty devices, wiring issues, or breaker concerns.

executionSequence.title: Stable Power Restore
executionSequence.description: The issue is repaired or clearly explained so the circuit can operate safely again.

serviceDetailPages.title: Lighting Installation
serviceDetailPages.heroImageAlt: Modern installed lighting in a home interior
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Upgrade your space with clean lighting installation for homes, offices, exteriors, and feature areas.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Lighting affects safety, comfort, design, productivity, and curb appeal. Lighting installation can include recessed lights, ceiling fixtures, dimmers, outdoor lights, security lighting, garage lighting, office lighting, and feature lighting. The goal is to place light where it works best while keeping the wiring safe and the finished look clean.

featureCards.title: Better Visibility
featureCards.description: Improve dark rooms, work areas, entrances, garages, basements, kitchens, and exterior spaces.

featureCards.title: Clean Installation
featureCards.description: Install fixtures, switches, and wiring with care for the final appearance of the space.

featureCards.title: Mood Control
featureCards.description: Add dimmers, zones, and lighting plans that support different uses throughout the day.

featureCards.title: Exterior Safety
featureCards.description: Support walkways, driveways, entrances, yards, and security areas with proper lighting.

executionSequence.title: Lighting Map
executionSequence.description: We review the space, purpose, fixture locations, switch placement, and desired brightness.

executionSequence.title: Wire Route
executionSequence.description: The installation path is planned for safe wiring, clean finish, and practical control.

executionSequence.title: Glow Test
executionSequence.description: Fixtures are installed, tested, adjusted, and reviewed for proper function.

serviceDetailPages.title: EV Charger Installation Prep
serviceDetailPages.heroImageAlt: Electric vehicle charger installed in a garage
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Prepare your home or business for EV charging with safe planning, dedicated circuits, and charger-ready wiring.
serviceDetailPages.mission: EV charger installation prep helps make sure your electrical system can safely support charging demand. This may include reviewing panel capacity, planning a dedicated circuit, choosing charger placement, checking wiring path options, and preparing the property for reliable everyday charging.

featureCards.title: Load Check
featureCards.description: Review whether the existing electrical panel can support EV charging demand.

featureCards.title: Dedicated Circuit
featureCards.description: Plan a dedicated circuit to support safer and more reliable charger performance.

featureCards.title: Smart Placement
featureCards.description: Choose charger locations based on parking layout, cable reach, protection, and convenience.

featureCards.title: Future Ready
featureCards.description: Prepare the electrical system for current and future electric vehicle needs.

executionSequence.title: Capacity Scan
executionSequence.description: We review panel size, available capacity, charger needs, and property layout.

executionSequence.title: Charge Route
executionSequence.description: The safest wiring route and charger placement are planned.

executionSequence.title: Ready Dock
executionSequence.description: The property is prepared for reliable EV charger use.

serviceDetailPages.title: Electrical Safety Inspections
serviceDetailPages.heroImageAlt: Electrician inspecting outlets and wiring for safety
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Check your electrical system for warning signs, unsafe conditions, outdated wiring, and potential risks.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Electrical safety inspections help identify issues before they become dangerous. A safety inspection may review outlets, switches, panels, wiring, grounding, overloaded circuits, damaged devices, GFCI protection, smoke detector wiring, and visible warning signs such as heat, buzzing, sparks, flickering, or burning smells.

featureCards.title: Spot Warning Signs
featureCards.description: Look for heat, buzzing, flickering, damaged devices, exposed wiring, or unsafe conditions.

featureCards.title: Check Protection
featureCards.description: Review GFCI protection, grounding concerns, panel condition, and basic safety coverage.

featureCards.title: Reduce Risk
featureCards.description: Identify issues that could lead to shock hazards, fire risks, or equipment damage.

featureCards.title: Plan Fixes
featureCards.description: Turn inspection findings into clear next steps for repair, upgrade, or monitoring.

executionSequence.title: Safety Walkthrough
executionSequence.description: We review the areas of concern, visible devices, panel condition, and reported warning signs.

executionSequence.title: Hazard Scan
executionSequence.description: Potential risks are identified and separated by urgency and importance.

executionSequence.title: Action Plan
executionSequence.description: You receive clear recommendations for safety repairs, upgrades, or further investigation.

serviceDetailPages.title: Surge Protection
serviceDetailPages.heroImageAlt: Electrical surge protection device near a panel
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Protect appliances, electronics, office equipment, and smart home devices from damaging voltage spikes.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Surge protection helps reduce the risk of damage from sudden voltage spikes. These spikes can come from utility changes, storms, large appliances cycling, electrical faults, or other power disturbances. Whole-home or business surge protection adds another layer of defense for expensive connected equipment.

featureCards.title: Protect Electronics
featureCards.description: Help defend TVs, computers, smart devices, routers, appliances, and office equipment.

featureCards.title: Panel-Level Shield
featureCards.description: Add protection at the electrical panel to support the entire property.

featureCards.title: Storm Defense
featureCards.description: Reduce risk from voltage spikes related to storms and utility disturbances.

featureCards.title: Equipment Confidence
featureCards.description: Support long-term reliability for sensitive connected devices.

executionSequence.title: Equipment Review
executionSequence.description: We review the property, panel, connected devices, and protection goals.

executionSequence.title: Shield Selection
executionSequence.description: The right surge protection approach is recommended based on property needs.

executionSequence.title: Protection Install
executionSequence.description: Surge protection is installed and reviewed for proper setup.

serviceDetailPages.title: Wiring and Rewiring
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Support renovations, additions, appliances, basements, and safer upgrades with clean wiring work.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Wiring and rewiring services support new installations, renovation work, damaged wiring replacement, basement finishing, appliance circuits, office layouts, and safety upgrades. Good wiring should be safe, organized, practical, and built around the way the space will actually be used.

featureCards.title: New Power Paths
featureCards.description: Add wiring for new rooms, appliances, workspaces, lighting, outlets, or equipment.

featureCards.title: Replace Unsafe Wiring
featureCards.description: Address damaged, outdated, overloaded, or unreliable wiring.

featureCards.title: Support Renovations
featureCards.description: Plan wiring around finished basements, remodels, additions, and layout changes.

featureCards.title: Organized Install
featureCards.description: Keep wiring clean, practical, and serviceable for future electrical needs.

executionSequence.title: Route Planning
executionSequence.description: We review the space, electrical demand, device locations, and best wiring path.

executionSequence.title: Circuit Build
executionSequence.description: Wiring is installed or replaced with attention to safety and clean routing.

executionSequence.title: Power Test
executionSequence.description: The completed wiring is tested and reviewed for reliable operation.

serviceDetailPages.title: Emergency Electrical Support
serviceDetailPages.heroCaption: Get help with urgent electrical warning signs such as sparks, burning smells, power loss, warm outlets, and exposed wiring.
serviceDetailPages.mission: Emergency electrical support is for urgent warning signs that may affect safety or property function. These issues can include burning smells, sparks, smoke, sudden power loss, repeated breaker trips, buzzing panels, warm outlets, exposed wires, or unsafe electrical conditions. The priority is to reduce danger, understand the issue, and guide the next safe step.

featureCards.title: Safety First
featureCards.description: Urgent electrical signs are treated seriously because they may point to fire, shock, or wiring hazards.

featureCards.title: Fast Triage
featureCards.description: The issue is reviewed quickly to understand the risk and recommend the safest next step.

featureCards.title: Fault Isolation
featureCards.description: Problem areas are identified so unsafe circuits or devices can be addressed.

featureCards.title: Power Recovery
featureCards.description: The goal is to restore safe function where possible and explain any required follow-up work.

executionSequence.title: Critical Signal
executionSequence.description: We review the urgent symptom, location, timing, and immediate safety concerns.

executionSequence.title: Risk Control
executionSequence.description: The affected area or circuit is assessed so danger can be reduced.

executionSequence.title: Restore or Stabilize
executionSequence.description: Electrical function is restored where safe, or a clear repair path is recommended.
